title: cynanchum viminale subsp. orangeanum
intro: Cynanchum viminale subsp. orangeanum is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the 'Nakhon Phanom vine' or 'Vine of Youth', native to Thailand and other parts of Southeast Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory activities. The health benefits of Cynanchum viminale subsp. orangeanum include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, extracts, or infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
